headline: Needham Raises its Price Target on The Cooper Companies, Inc. (COO) to $101 from $99 and Maintains a Buy Rating
summary: The Cooper Companies, Inc. (NASDAQ:COO) is among the 11 Most Oversold Stocks to Buy Now. On March 6, 2026, Needham raised its price target on The Cooper Companies, Inc. headline: 5 Revealing Analyst Questions From CooperCompanies’s Q4 Earnings Call
summary: CooperCompanies’ fourth quarter was met with a negative market reaction, as investors focused on the company’s slower organic revenue growth and ongoing challenges in the Asia Pacific region. While management cited robust product launches and improved profitability, CEO Albert White acknowledged that legacy hydrogel product softness in Japan was a key factor holding back growth.
